expansionPolicy: Two-task manifest exercising a provider/model pair whose delimiter-joined forms collide ("a/b" + "c" vs "a" + "b/c"), so byCandidate must aggregate them as two rows, never one.

tasks.source: Synthetic: provider "a/b", model "c"; a naive provider/model/class join would read "a/b/c/standard".
Synthetic: provider "a", model "b/c"; a naive provider/model/class join would collide with EVAL-COLL-A's "a/b/c/standard".
